failedAssertions.reason: Shared categories.ts exports 8 values (includes Fragrances, Eyewear) but API create.ts/update.ts PRODUCT_CATEGORIES only accept 6 values. Submitting Fragrances or Eyewear via shared constants would cause 400 errors. The infra-fixes feature is planned to resolve this by either adding the 2 missing categories to the API or removing them from shared.
